query: long exposure light trails night abstract streaks
message: sub:intentional_blur/light_trails — anti_aesthetic — long exposure streaks, chaotic light painting, ICM at night

response.objective_caption: Flowing white and gray fabric-like forms sweep diagonally across a near-black background, with curved edges and layered translucent strands creating a sense of motion and depth.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: Flowing white and gray forms sweep across darkness with deliberate motion blur dissolving edges into soft streaks, the abstract fabric-like strands lacking definable texture or identifiable subject matter as they merge into an indistinct atmospheric study of movement and tone.
